title: Identification of adulteration in botanical samples with untargeted metabolomics.
author: Wallace ED Todd DA Harnly JM Cech NB Kellogg JJ
content: S-EPMC7321857 PMC7321857 Identification of adulteration in botanical samples with untargeted metabolomics. Adulteration remains an issue in the dietary supplement industry, including botanical supplements. While it is common to employ a targeted analysis to detect known adulterants
